utterance: I'm exhausted and want to unplug for a week, budget around 4000 per day, thinking September, no beaches please

expected.notes: Should surface peaceful/offbeat mountain or spiritual picks, never a beach type.

utterance: My partner and I are celebrating our anniversary, want something romantic but not touristy, our budget is 8000 per day

expected.notes: Should weight romantic vibe and couple suitability; budget sits at the mid/premium boundary so soft budget_flag on premium picks is expected, not a hard exclusion.

utterance: Take my family somewhere in October, not too hot, budget 3000 per day

expected.notes: Family suitability and October seasonal fit should dominate; budget is tight (budget tier), premium picks should be hard-excluded, not just flagged.

utterance: Just tell us somewhere cool to go this weekend under 3000 per day with friends

expected.notes: Tight budget, friends group; expect budget-tier, easy-access, short-duration destinations rather than 7+ day trips.

utterance: Surprise me, I'm open to anything

expected.notes: Should trigger inspiration mode and weight toward higher hidden_gem_score destinations, not the most touristy picks.

persona: PRD acceptance criterion: July query must not return monsoon-unsafe picks
utterance: I want to travel in July, budget 5000 per day

expected.notes: Direct test of FR-03 acceptance criterion: none of the 3 results may have 7 in avoid_months without an explicit seasonal_flag.

persona: Solo traveler wanting the road less traveled
utterance: I want to go somewhere nobody I know has been to, solo trip, budget 3500 a day, want to disconnect

expected.notes: Qualitative check: average hidden_gem_score of the 3 picks should read noticeably above the dataset median (mock heuristic can't detect 'nobody has been to' directly - a real LLM would generalise further; flagged here as a known mock limitation).

persona: Family wanting a December wildlife trip
utterance: Show me wildlife destinations for December, budget 6000 per day, with my family

expected.notes: Expect wildlife-type destinations in the mix; premium wildlife parks (Kanha, Bandhavgarh) should appear with a budget_flag rather than being excluded, since the gap is exactly one tier.
